name: Chinese Chicken Salad (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1 small clove garlic, peeled and blanched
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, combine and puree the peanut and sesame oils, garlic, sugar, rice vinegar, soy sauce, peanut butter, and sesame paste.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper. If desired, stir in chili paste.
3. Right before serving, toss the chicken (torn into bite-sized pieces), macaroni, and peas with the sauce.
4. Garnish with scallions (green parts thinly sliced) and cilantro (optional).
Yield: 4 servings
